original_snippet_context: Discussing Affonso Penna's political platform and views on financial and economic policy.

justification: While not explicitly mentioning the Caixa de Conversão, the text praises the existing monetary valorization mechanisms and advocates for slow, natural processes of monetary reorganization, echoing orthodox concerns for stability.  The emphasis on guaranteeing the value of paper currency and gradual reduction of forced currency also aligns with this perspective.
